infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: HARDA uses your camera to capture road hazard photos so they can be analysed and reported.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: HARDA needs access to your photo library so you can pick existing hazard photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: HARDA uses your location to geotag hazards you submit and show nearby reports on the map.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow HARDA to access your camera so you can capture hazard photos.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow HARDA to use your location to geotag hazards.
